name: IdsEdwLoadCapRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cteMin AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD,SRC_SYS_CD,SUBJ_CD,MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS MIN_RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD='IDS' AND SUBJ_CD='CAPITATION' AND EDW_LOAD_IN='N' AND (RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} OR RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSBCBSKCRunCycle} OR RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSBCBSARunCycle} OR RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.LumerisRunCycle}) GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD,SRC_SYS_CD,SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET T.EDW_LOAD_IN='Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN cteMin C ON T.TRGT_SYS_CD=C.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD=C.SUBJ_CD AND T.SRC_SYS_CD=C.SRC_SYS_CD WHERE T.EDW_LOAD_IN='N' AND T.RUN_CYC_NO >= C.MIN_RUN_CYC_NO

Annotations:
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
Job Name:
IdsEdwLoadProdRunCycUpdExtr
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EDW Capitation Load Indicator Update
